N_L21B_AMP_UDS_D3_20170210

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 782
Recv ID: 7A2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 86
Func Name: AMP

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "11111111111111111111111111111111",
    "version": "11111111111111111111111111111111"
  }
]
